subcodes.first_line: O scion of him who was martyred in the path of God... Sardar-i-As'ad whilst in Paris [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل شهید فی سبیل الهی ... سردار اسعد وقتی که در پاریس
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
